title: QueryExperiment (registration)
description: Pre-registration record of a query experiment (treatment/control or matched-cluster design). Immutable after approval — registration ONLY, NO outcome/DiD/causal/lift fields (docs/architecture/wave4-plan.md 'Forbidden in W4'; outcome measurement is Wave 5).
$comment: compat_class: closed, signed: true (human-signed family, same line as ChangePlan/ApprovalDecision — ADR-0024(b) 'signed=true 계약은 ChangePlan, ApprovalDecision 2종뿐(v1)' is amended by this Wave 4 unit per wave4-plan.md's explicit created_by/approved_by field pair, mirroring ApprovalDecision's human-approval requirement). Authority: docs/architecture/contract-catalog.md P1 table row 'QueryExperiment | experiment-attribution | 사전등록 후 immutable — 등록 hash를 audit-ledger 앵커링 (H-3); JSON Schema(사람 서명 계열)'; docs/architecture/wave4-plan.md 'Experiment ledger — registration ONLY (baseline/treatment/control or matched cluster, metric defs, query cluster, locale, browser policy, repeat count, asset hash, code/version hash, created_by/approved_by, timestamp, canonical hash, previous-hash anchor). Reuse saena_domain.audit hash chain + canonicalization (no new hashing rule).' Every field below traces verbatim to that list. design_type/query_cluster_ids/locale mirror context/run-context-experiment/v1's sibling experiment-design fields (engine_id, locales/locale, registration_hash/canonical_hash) — this domain contract is the fuller registration record; run-context-experiment stays the RunContext-split summary (data-ownership.md:39 join key run_id). previous_hash's anyOf[null, sha256_ref] shape verbatim-mirrors domain/audit-event/v1#/properties/prev_event_hash (genesis = null, no prior anchor). NO new hashing/canonicalization rule invented here per wave4-plan.md instruction — canonical_hash/previous_hash reuse the existing sha256_ref shape and audit-chain null-genesis convention already established by domain/audit-event and context/run-context-experiment.

run_id.$comment: Join key back to context/run-context-experiment/v1 (data-ownership.md:39 'engine, locale, observation cell'), same run_id-keyed relationship.

engine_id.$comment: wave4-plan.md 'Engine — chatgpt-search ONLY'. Mirrors context/run-context-experiment/v1#/properties/engine_id usage (root type reference, not the payload activation fragment).

experiment_id.$comment: Opaque experiment identifier, mirrors common/identifiers/v1 opaque-id shape but not promoted there (not one of the 6 CONFIRMED core business identifiers). Correlation key shared with event/experiment-registered and event/experiment-anchored payloads.

design_type.$comment: wave4-plan.md 'baseline/treatment/control or matched cluster' design taxonomy.

query_cluster_ids.$comment: wave4-plan.md 'query cluster' — references domain/demand-graph query-cluster IDs (opaque strings, no cross-file $ref per the common-only $ref convention).

metric_defs.$comment: wave4-plan.md 'metric defs' — nested closed object per item, mirrors domain/change-plan.hypotheses[] item-closure convention.

locale.$comment: wave4-plan.md 'locale' — mirrors context/run-context-experiment/v1#/properties/locales item shape (BCP-47 practical bound, pattern deferred per that schema's own $comment); singular here since one registration = one observation cell's locale, vs the RunContext summary's array.

browser_policy.$comment: wave4-plan.md 'browser policy' — opaque browser/session policy profile identifier.

repeat_count.$comment: wave4-plan.md 'repeat count' — number of observation repeats for this experiment cell.

asset_hash.$comment: wave4-plan.md 'asset hash' — content-addressed hash of the treatment asset(s) under test.

code_version_hash.$comment: wave4-plan.md 'code/version hash' — hash of the measurement code/version used for this registration.

created_by.$comment: wave4-plan.md 'created_by' — PII minimization: actor_id only, mirrors ApprovalDecision.approver_actor_id convention (contract-catalog.md 'actor PII 최소화').

approved_by.$comment: wave4-plan.md 'approved_by' — human-approval actor, the field that makes this contract signed:true (ADR-0024(b) vocabulary).

canonical_hash.$comment: wave4-plan.md 'canonical hash' — the preregistration hash anchored to the audit-ledger (contract-catalog.md 'H-3'; mirrors context/run-context-experiment/v1#/properties/registration_hash's immutability rationale).

previous_hash.$comment: wave4-plan.md 'previous-hash anchor' — verbatim-mirrors domain/audit-event/v1#/properties/prev_event_hash (genesis registration uses null).
